 Number of worker threads for parallel assembly.
 

Detailed Description

PMCHWT formulation for SIE in homogeneous and layered media.

Uses RWG basis/testing and Green's function back-ends (homogeneous and optionally layered) to assemble the block matrix:

\[\begin{bmatrix} \mathrm{j}\,\omega\,\mu\,\mathbf{D} & \,\mathbf{K} \\ -\,\mathbf{K} & \mathrm{j}\,\omega\,\varepsilon\,\mathbf{D} \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} \mathbf{J} \\[2pt] \mathbf{M} \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} \mathbf{q}^\mathbf{E}_{\mathrm{inc}} \\[2pt] \mathbf{q}^\mathbf{H}_{\mathrm{inc}} \end{bmatrix}, \]

where blocks are populated by double-surface integrals of Green kernels and their curls/gradients, evaluated with RWG functions on mesh triangles.

Definition at line 51 of file SIEFormPMCHW.h.

Parameters
inRWGFunsRWG basis functions (owned elsewhere).
inGrnFunHomogeneous Green's function (for same-layer cases).
inIncFieldsIncident fields used to build the RHS.
inVacWavelengthVacuum wavelength.
inGrnFunLayeredLayered Green's function back-end.
inEpsilonLayer-wise relative permittivity values.
inMuLayer-wise relative permeability values.
inZValsInterface z-positions (ascending).
inMidLayerIndexLayer index of the mesh middle point.

Member Function Documentation

◆ AssignThreads()

void SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads ( int t)
static

Configure how many threads to use for parallel assembly.

Parameters
tNumber of threads (>=1).

Definition at line 474 of file SIEFormPMCHW.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ FillLSEMatrix()

int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrix ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseMatrix)
virtual

Assemble the PMCHWT system matrix for a homogeneous/layered medium.

Parameters
lseMatrixOutput A (2Nx2N). Caller must size appropriately.
Returns
0 on success.

Partitions RWGs by owner triangle, spawns (threads-1) workers plus the current thread to call FillLSEMatrixParallel. Uses per-row mutexes to update matrix blocks safely.

Implements SIEForm.

Definition at line 60 of file SIEFormPMCHW.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ FillLSEMatrixAndGradient()

int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixAndGradient ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseMatrix,
blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseGradientMatrix[3] )
virtual

Assemble A and its gradients w.r.t.

3 geometry params (homogeneous).

Parameters
lseMatrixOutput A.
lseGradientMatrixArray of 3 gradient matrices.
Returns
0 on success.

Triangles are grouped, and workers call FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel. Gradient contributions are computed only for boundary-type pairs that cross the 0–1 interface (as per existing code logic).

Implements SIEForm.

Definition at line 215 of file SIEFormPMCHW.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel()

int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseMatrix,
blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseGradientMatrix[3],
const std::vector< std::vector< RWGFun * > > & rwgPerTri,
const std::vector< int > & bordertype,
int & index,
std::mutex * mut )

Worker for parallel assembly of A and gradients (homogeneous).

Parameters
lseMatrixOutput A (shared).
lseGradientMatrixOutput gradient matrices (shared).
rwgPerTriGrouped RWG per triangle.
bordertypePer-triangle boundary category used for gradient logic.
indexShared index into rwgPerTri (guarded).
mutRow mutex array; last element guards index.
Returns
0 on success.

Gradient terms are only accumulated for triangle-pair types that meet the selector (bordertype[i] + bordertype[j] == 3), following existing logic.

◆ FillLSEMatrixParallel()

int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixParallel ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * lseMatrix,
const std::vector< std::vector< RWGFun * > > & rwgPerTri,
int & index,
std::mutex * mut )

Worker for parallel homogeneous/layered media assembly (triangle-group partition).

Parameters
lseMatrixOutput A (shared across workers; protected by row mutexes).
rwgPerTriRWG basis grouped by owner triangle.
indexShared index into rwgPerTri (atomic via mutex).
mutArray of mutexes; last one guards index.
Returns
0 on success.

◆ FillLSEVector()

int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEVector ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 1 > * lseVector)
virtual

Assemble PMCHWT right-hand side vector for current incident fields.

Parameters
lseVectorOutput b (size 2Nx1).
Returns
0 on success.

For homogeneous media, uses IntegrateE/IntegrateH; for layered media, uses IntegrateLayeredEandH to get matching contributions per RWG edge.

Implements SIEForm.

Definition at line 386 of file SIEFormPMCHW.cpp.

◆ GetLayerIndex()

int SIEFormPMCHW::GetLayerIndex ( rvec pos) const

Return the layer index for a 3D position (based on z).

Parameters
posCartesian position.
Returns
Layer index in [0...N], using zValsInterfaces with tolerance.

Indexing convention:

  • 0 : below the first interface
  • 1..N-1 : between interfaces i-1 and i
  • N : above the last interface with a small tolerance on comparisons.

Definition at line 435 of file SIEFormPMCHW.cpp.
